mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(users.first_name, '') AS firstName, COALESCE(users.last_name, '') AS lastName, '' AS gender, '' AS dateOfBirth, '' AS address, COALESCE(users.telephone, '') AS telephone, COALESCE(users.email, '') AS email, NULL AS nationalityId, '' AS nationalityName, COALESCE(users.username, '') AS username FROM users WHERE users.is_active = 1 AND users.id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT password FROM users WHERE is_active = 1 AND id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET username = #{username}, first_name = #{firstName}, last_name = #{lastName}, telephone = #{telephone}, email = #{email}, password = #{password}, modified = NOW(), modified_by = #{modifiedBy} WHERE id = #{id};
